bridgeDownloadHost.description: HTTP host used when exposing local media files to the bridge

defaultAccount.description: Preferred default WeChat account for channel-level routing and fallback

agent.description: Legacy fallback agent id; prefer bindings[].match.accountId instead

nonOwnerToolAuthMode.description: Policy for non-owner sensitive tool use. deny = hard reject, approve = approval flow, off = no extra gate

nonOwnerToolAuthTools.description: Sensitive tool names protected by the non-owner policy

ownerExecBypassApproval.description: Best-effort hint that owner exec may bypass extra chat-side approval prompts

nonOwnerSkillBlacklist.description: Skill names blocked for non-owner users; owner-only when matched

enabled.description: Whether the WeChat channel is enabled

bridgeDownloadHost.description: HTTP host used when exposing local media files to the bridge

defaultAccount.description: Preferred default WeChat account for channel-level routing and fallback

name.description: Display name for the WeChat account

enabled.description: Whether this WeChat account is enabled

agent.description: Legacy fallback agent id; prefer bindings[].match.accountId instead

nonOwnerToolAuthMode.description: Policy for non-owner sensitive tool use. deny = hard reject, approve = approval flow, off = no extra gate

nonOwnerToolAuthTools.description: Sensitive tool names protected by the non-owner policy

ownerExecBypassApproval.description: Best-effort hint that owner exec may bypass extra chat-side approval prompts

nonOwnerSkillBlacklist.description: Skill names blocked for non-owner users; owner-only when matched

uiHints.label: WeChat
uiHints.help: WeChat bridge configuration, account routing, and chat-side permission controls.

enabled.label: WeChat Enabled
enabled.help: Enable or disable the WeChat channel without removing its saved bridge settings.

wsHost.label: WeChat WS Host
wsHost.help: Host address the WeChat bridge listener binds to.

wsPort.label: WeChat WS Port
wsPort.help: Port used by the WeChat bridge WebSocket listener.

wsPath.label: WeChat WS Path
wsPath.help: HTTP path exposed by the bridge WebSocket server.

bridgeDownloadHost.label: Bridge Download Host
bridgeDownloadHost.help: Host name or IP the bridge uses when OpenClaw exposes local media files over HTTP.

defaultAccount.label: Default WeChat Account
defaultAccount.help: Preferred account id used when a request does not explicitly target a specific WeChat account.

accounts.label: WeChat Accounts
accounts.help: Per-account display names and enablement flags for each connected WeChat identity.

nonOwnerToolAuthMode.label: Non-owner Tool Auth Mode
nonOwnerToolAuthMode.help: Extra approval policy for sensitive tool use by non-owner WeChat users: off, deny, or approve.

nonOwnerToolAuthTools.label: Protected Tool Names
nonOwnerToolAuthTools.help: Tool names guarded by the non-owner policy above.

ownerExecBypassApproval.label: Owner Exec Bypass Approval
ownerExecBypassApproval.help: Best-effort hint that owner exec requests may skip extra chat-side approval prompts.

nonOwnerSkillBlacklist.label: Non-owner Skill Blacklist
nonOwnerSkillBlacklist.help: Skills blocked for non-owner WeChat users.

wechat.label: WeChat
wechat.description: WeChat bridge configuration and account settings.
